_publications._publicationTitle: A platform for rapid patient-derived cutaneous neurofibroma organoid establishment and screening.

_contextSnippet: Our results showed that cNF organoids correlate strongly with the parental tumors, with calculated Spearman's rank correlations >0.8 for all culture conditions
details: Maintained high transcriptional correlation with parental tumors (Spearman's rank correlations >0.8 for all culture conditions, with StemPro showing median 0.91)
